member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring font resolution services in a Windows environment.
member.remarks: This class contains static methods that extend the functionality of the IServiceCollection interface, enabling the registration of Windows-specific font resolver implementations. Use these methods to integrate font resolution capabilities into dependency injection setups.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddWindowsFontResolver(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a Windows-specific font resolver implementation in the dependency injection container.
member.remarks: Use this method when running on Windows to enable font resolution using system fonts. The registered font resolver will be used for font-related operations throughout the application.
member.param: The service collection to which the font resolver will be added. Cannot be null.
member.returns: The updated service collection with the Windows font resolver registered.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver
member.summary: Provides font resolution services for mapping font family names and styles to font file paths and retrieving font data. Implements the IFontResolver interface to support custom font selection and loading.
member.remarks: FontResolver enables applications to locate and load font files based on family name and style attributes such as bold and italic. It searches the system's font directory and supports simulation of bold or italic styles if the exact variant is unavailable. This class is thread-safe and caches font family mappings for performance. Use FontResolver when you need to resolve font resources dynamically or support custom font loading scenarios.

member.name: F:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver.FontFamilies
member.summary: Provides a lazily initialized mapping of font family names to their corresponding font family entries.
member.remarks: The dictionary is created on first access using the BuildFontFamilyMap method. Accessing this member is thread-safe due to the use of Lazy<T>.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver.ResolveTypeface(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resolves the typeface information for a specified font family and style attributes.
member.remarks: If the requested style is not available in the specified font family, the method may simulate bold or italic styles as needed. The returned FontResolverInfo indicates whether simulation is required.
member.param: The name of the font family to resolve. Cannot be null, empty, or whitespace.
A value indicating whether the bold style is requested.
A value indicating whether the italic style is requested.
member.returns: A FontResolverInfo instance containing the resolved font path and simulation flags, or null if the family or style cannot be resolved.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver.GetFont(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the font file as a byte array for the specified font face name.
member.param: The path to the font file to retrieve. Cannot be null, empty, or whitespace.
member.returns: A byte array containing the contents of the font file, or null if the file does not exist or the path is invalid.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver.BuildFontFamilyMap
member.summary: Builds a mapping of installed font family names to their corresponding font file entries for regular, bold, italic, and bold italic styles.
member.remarks: The mapping includes only font families for which at least one style variant is available. The search is limited to fonts installed in the Windows Fonts folder and supports TrueType, OpenType, and TrueType Collection formats. The dictionary uses a case-insensitive string comparer for font family names.
member.returns: A dictionary containing font family names as keys and their associated font file entries as values. The dictionary is empty if no fonts are found.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver.FindBestMatch(System.String[],System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Finds the font file that best matches the specified font family and style attributes from a list of available font files.
member.remarks: The method performs a case-insensitive search for font files whose names contain the specified family name and ranks candidates based on their similarity to the requested style attributes.
member.param: An array of file paths representing available font files to search.
The name of the font family to match against the available font files.
A value indicating whether the desired font style is bold. Set to for bold; otherwise, .
A value indicating whether the desired font style is italic. Set to for italic; otherwise, .
member.returns: The file path of the font file that best matches the specified family and style attributes, or if no suitable match is found.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver.Score(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates a score indicating how well a font file matches the specified bold and italic attributes.
member.remarks: This method analyzes the font file name to determine if it contains keywords related to bold, italic, or regular styles. The score is adjusted based on how closely the file name matches the requested attributes.
member.param: The file path of the font to evaluate. Must refer to a valid font file.
A value indicating whether the font should be bold.
A value indicating whether the font should be italic.
member.returns: An integer score representing the degree of match between the font's name and the requested bold and italic attributes. Lower scores indicate a better match.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver.Normalize(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a normalized version of the specified string containing only lowercase letters and digits.
member.remarks: Normalization removes all non-letter and non-digit characters and converts all letters to lowercase using the invariant culture.
member.param: The string to normalize. Can be null or empty; in such cases, the result will be an empty string.
member.returns: A string consisting of the lowercase letters and digits from the input. If the input contains no letters or digits, returns an empty string.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Windows.FontResolver.FontFamilyEntry
member.summary: Represents a set of font family style names, including regular, bold, italic, and bold italic variants.
